name: hcode-ai
description: Built-in AI assistant for HCode. Supports Ollama (local), Google Gemini, OpenAI/Codex, Anthropic Claude and more.

chatParticipants.name: hcode
chatParticipants.description: Your built-in AI coding assistant — works with Ollama, Gemini, OpenAI, Claude and more

commands.name: fix
commands.description: Find and fix bugs in selection

commands.name: test
commands.description: Generate unit tests for selected code

commands.name: commit
commands.description: Generate a conventional commit message from staged changes

commands.name: setup
commands.description: Configure HCode AI provider and model

languageModelTools.name: hcode_readFile
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Reads the content of a file from the workspace.
languageModelTools.userDescription: Read a file from the workspace.

filePath.description: Relative path to the file from workspace root

languageModelTools.name: hcode_listDirectory
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Lists files and directories inside a workspace directory.

dirPath.description: Relative path to directory from workspace root. Use '.' for root.

maxDepth.description: Max depth to recurse. Default is 1.

languageModelTools.name: hcode_runTerminal
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Runs a shell command in the workspace terminal and returns its output.

cwd.description: Working directory (relative to workspace root). Defaults to workspace root.

languageModelTools.name: hcode_searchCode
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Searches for a pattern in the workspace. Returns matching file paths and lines.
languageModelTools.userDescription: Search for a pattern in the workspace.

filePattern.description: Glob pattern to filter files. E.g. '**/*.ts'

isRegex.description: Whether pattern is a regex. Default false.

languageModelTools.name: hcode_gitStatus
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Returns current git status: staged, unstaged, and untracked files, plus recent commits.
languageModelTools.userDescription: Check git status of the workspace.

languageModelTools.name: hcode_getDiagnostics
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Returns TypeScript/language server errors and warnings for specified files.
languageModelTools.userDescription: Get errors and warnings from the language server.

filePath.description: Optional: file to get diagnostics for. If omitted, returns workspace-wide diagnostics.

languageModelTools.name: hcode_webSearch
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Searches the web for information to answer questions or solve problems.

enumDescriptions: Ollama — run models locally (free, private, no internet required)
Google Gemini — Google's AI models (free tier available)
OpenAI / Codex — GPT-4, GPT-4o, Codex and compatible APIs
Anthropic Claude — Claude 3.5, Claude 3 Haiku, etc.
hcode.ai.provider.description: AI provider to use for HCode AI

hcode.ai.ollama.model.description: Ollama model to use (e.g. codellama:13b, deepseek-coder:6.7b, qwen2.5-coder:7b, phi4:14b)

hcode.ai.gemini.apiKey.description: Google Gemini API key (get one free at aistudio.google.com)

hcode.ai.openai.apiKey.description: OpenAI API key (also works with compatible APIs like Groq, Together, etc.)

hcode.ai.openai.endpoint.description: OpenAI-compatible API endpoint (change for Groq, Together, local etc.)

enumDescriptions: Codex Mini — optimized for code completion

hcode.ai.memory.enabled.description: Enable workspace AI memory (stores context in .hcode/ai-memory/)

hcode.ai.agent.autoApproveTerminal.description: Auto-approve terminal commands run by the AI agent (use with caution)

hcode.ai.statusBar.enabled.description: Show AI provider status in the status bar

walkthroughs.title: Getting Started with HCode AI
walkthroughs.description: Set up your AI assistant and start coding smarter

steps.title: Choose Your AI Provider
steps.description:
Pick Ollama for local privacy, Gemini for free cloud AI, or OpenAI/Claude for premium models.
[Configure Provider](command:hcode.ai.setup)

steps.title: Start Chatting
steps.description:
Open the chat panel and ask HCode AI anything about your code.
[Open Chat](command:workbench.action.chat.open)

steps.title: Workspace Memory
steps.description: HCode AI remembers your project context between sessions in .hcode/ai-memory/
